# Awesome AI Agent Tools

> The most comprehensive open-source library for AI agent skills, MCP servers, and agent workflows. 611 installable components across 8 categories -- skills, MCPs, loops, subagents, hooks, plugins, prompts, and tools -- curated from 100+ repositories. Works with Claude Code, OpenCode, Codex, Cursor, Gemini CLI, Copilot, and 30+ AI coding assistants.

## Overview

Awesome AI Agent Tools is the largest open-source collection of installable components for AI coding assistants. Every item is sourced from real projects with provenance and install commands -- no hallucinated or synthetic entries.

The library covers the full AI agent stack: skills (SKILL.md files), MCP servers, agent workflow loops, subagent definitions, hooks, plugins, prompts, and CLI tools. Each category includes a JSON catalog for programmatic discovery and a human-readable directory. Components are tagged by platform, category, and source.

Built for interoperability, this collection works with Claude Code, OpenCode, Codex, KiloCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI, Copilot, Aider, Windsurf, and every major AI coding assistant. Contributions are welcome -- see CONTRIBUTING.md.

## What This Repo Contains

- **88 Curated Skills**: SKILL.md files across 9 categories (Development 33, Productivity 17, Content 8, Design 7, DevOps 7, Testing 3, Marketing 4, Data 3, Security 2)
- **110 MCP Server Configurations**: Verified Model Context Protocol servers with install commands across 16 categories
- **115 Agent Loops**: Repeatable workflow patterns with exact prompts, verification criteria, and source attribution across 7 categories
- **32 Subagent Definitions**: Specialized agents with model routing and tool permissions across 5 categories
- **25 Hooks**: Event-driven extensions across 7 categories
- **53 Plugins**: Extensions for Claude Code, OpenCode, Cursor, and 6 more platforms across 9 categories
- **122 Prompts**: Curated prompt templates and strategies across 9+ categories
- **66 CLI Tools**: Command-line utilities and automation across 12 categories
- **Cross-Platform Support**: Works with 30+ AI coding assistants
- **JSON Catalogs**: Machine-readable catalogs for programmatic discovery

## Quick Start

```bash
# Add a skill to your project
npx skills add <skill-name>

# Clone the full collection
git clone https://github.com/your-org/awesome-ai-agent-tools.git

# Browse the catalog
https://awesome-ai-agent-tools.vercel.app
```

## Key Features

- **30+ Platforms Supported**: Claude Code, OpenCode, Codex, KiloCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI, Copilot, Aider, Windsurf, and more
- **JSON Catalogs**: Every category has a machine-readable catalog for tooling integration
- **Agent-Contributable**: Add components via CONTRIBUTE.md -- agents can self-contribute
- **SKILL.md Open Standard**: Skills follow the SKILL.md specification for portability

## Key Files

- [README](README.md) - Project overview, quick start, and full catalog
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md) - How to add skills, MCPs, or loops
- [Skills Library](skills/) - 88 SKILL.md files across 9 categories
- [MCP Servers](mcps/) - 110 MCP servers with install commands
- [Agent Loops](loops/) - 115 workflow patterns with catalog
- [Subagents](subagents/) - 32 specialized agent definitions
- [Hooks](hooks/) - 25 event-driven extensions
- [Plugins](plugins/) - 53 plugins across 9 platforms
- [Prompts](prompts/) - 122 curated prompt templates
- [CLI Tools](tools/) - 66 command-line utilities
- [Documentation](docs/) - Getting started, feature reference, tool comparisons
- [Rules & Best Practices](rules/) - Security, ethics, quality guidelines
